name: How to prove pain after work slip no broken bones?

mainEntity.name: How to prove pain after work slip no broken bones?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical testimony, functional tests, and daily logs show soft tissue damage impacts.** Subjective pain compensable.[1] Key factors: (1) Consistent complaints; (2) Therapy records; (3) Impairment rating. Avoid overstatement. Attorney maximizes non-economic.
